name: Brute
description: Strength is your answer to most problems. Subtlety was never your style—why whisper when you can make a statement with your fists? The world respects power, and you've got more than enough to spare.

feats.name: Push Them Around
feats.description: You got use to pushing people around enough that it comes with ease now. After you make a successful melee attack, you may immediately use **Shove** at no cost. On a **critical hit**, you gain **Resolve** on your next attack roll.

_review: attribute_bonus was "+1 Body" — mapped to brawn; verify Brawn vs Finesse
